STAR Smog Check

Certified STAR station authorized to test and repair all vehicles, including those directed by the DMV.

All Makes & Models

From daily drivers to exotics — we test everything. Domestic, import, diesel, and hybrid vehicles welcome.

Fast Turnaround

Most smog checks completed quickly. We respect your time and keep the process smooth and efficient.

📋

DMV-Directed Tests

STAR-certified to handle vehicles specifically referred by the DMV for enhanced inspection and testing.

Pre-Test Consultation
